ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided document:  The Board of ACE Integrated Solutions Limited has recommended the re-appointment of Mr. Chandra Shekhar Verma as Chairman & Managing Director and Mr. Kumar Vishwajeet Singh as an Independent Director, both for new five-year terms subject to shareholder approval, signaling leadership continuity. However, a significant red flag is the high concentration of familial power at the executive level, as the Chairman & MD's wife serves as a Whole-Time Director and his daughter as an Executive Director, which raises potential corporate governance concerns regarding board independence and executive oversight.
